title: Problem
description: Represents a Dynatrace-detected problem, which is an aggregated set of related events indicating a service degradation. Problems are detected and correlated by the Davis AI engine.

problemId.description: The internal unique identifier of the problem, e.g., -1234567890123456789_V2.

displayId.description: The human-readable problem identifier displayed in the Dynatrace UI, e.g., P-123456.

title.description: The title summarizing the nature of the problem, generated by the Davis AI.

severityLevel.description: The severity classification of the problem, indicating the type of impact.

status.description: The current status of the problem.

startTime.description: The Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the problem was first detected.

endTime.description: The Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the problem was resolved. Returns -1 if the problem is still open.

affectedEntities.description: The list of entities directly affected by the problem. These are the entities where the anomaly was first detected.

impactedEntities.description: The list of entities experiencing degradation as a result of the problem, including downstream dependencies.

rootCauseEntity.description: The entity identified by Davis AI as the root cause of the problem. Null if the root cause could not be determined.

managementZones.description: The management zones that contain the affected entities, used for access control and scoping.

problemFilters.description: The alerting profiles (problem filters) that match this problem and control notification routing.
